items.title: Literals and formatted I/O types: reject the invalid rule

items.title: Literals and formatted I/O types: executable application
items.prompt: Read one signed 64-bit integer with the portable inttypes conversion macro and print its absolute magnitude as an unsigned 64-bit value.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted deterministic draft awaiting independent human standards, security, and assessment review.
